decisions.what: Updated benefits section in index.html with three specific benefit cards
decisions.why: Specification requested benefits section with Sustainable Practices, Proven Profitability, and Expert Management cards with proper semantic HTML structure using section, article, and heading elements
To match the CSS class naming convention specified in the CSS change description and maintain consistency with other section classes like 'hero-section'

decisions.what: Updated benefit card content with detailed descriptions
decisions.why: Specification required detailed content for each benefit: soil health and biodiversity for Sustainable Practices, increased yields and reduced costs for Proven Profitability, and decades of experience and scientific approach for Expert Management

decisions.what: Added benefit-headline and benefit-description classes to h3 and p elements
decisions.why: CSS specification required these specific classes for proper typography styling as mentioned in the code change description

decisions.what: Implemented benefits-section and benefits-grid styles in components.css
decisions.why: Specification required responsive grid layout using CSS Grid with repeat(auto-fit, minmax(300px, 1fr)) pattern that stacks on mobile

decisions.what: Added comprehensive benefit card styling with hover effects
decisions.why: Code change description required background, padding, border-radius, box-shadow, and hover effects for benefit cards

decisions.what: Styled benefit-icon, benefit-headline, and benefit-description elements
decisions.why: Specification required distinct typography styles for icons, headlines, and descriptions using CSS custom properties for consistent theming
